title: Isla's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Baby Isla discovers the changing seasons through peek-a-boo games with nature, from spring flowers to winter snowflakes.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, spring! Where is Isla? Behind the pink flowers!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding behind blooming cherry blossoms in a garden with soft spring pastels of pink, light green, and pale yellow
illustration.alt: Isla playing peek-a-boo behind spring flowers

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, summer! Where is Isla? Under the big green tree!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sitting under a large oak tree with vibrant summer colors of bright green leaves, golden sunshine, and blue sky
illustration.alt: Isla hiding under a summer tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, autumn! Where is Isla? In the orange leaves!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes playing in a pile of fallen autumn leaves with warm colors of orange, red, golden yellow, and brown

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, winter! Where is Isla? Behind the white snowman!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes peeking from behind a snowman with cool winter colors of white snow, pale blue sky, and silver tree branches
illustration.alt: Isla hiding behind a winter snowman

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What color are the spring flowers?
questions.explanation: The spring flowers are pink, like cherry blossoms!

questions.question: Where does Isla hide in summer?
questions.explanation: Isla hides under the big green tree in summer!

questions.question: What does Isla hide behind in winter?
questions.explanation: Isla hides behind the white snowman in winter!
